sources.title: Feral Membrane / TinkerDen Flight Deck
sources.positive_functionality: Live membrane view, drift log, action conveyor, optional packets, Swanson relay placeholders, final assembly buttons, and momentum taps.
sources.merge_question: Keep as the merge staging shell, but stop treating it as the only source.

sources.title: TinkerDen Bridge
sources.positive_functionality: Current frontier, Top 3 Moves, command surface, receipt pickup, canonical receipt lane, and Human Gate selection that records no spawned action.
sources.merge_question: Bring the human-readable Top Three Moves and receipt pickup into the final membrane without hiding the gate semantics.

sources.title: TinkerDen Mission Control
sources.positive_functionality: WHY surface: destination, source material, current frontier, success conditions, and non-goals.
sources.merge_question: Keep as the human orientation lane so the membrane is not only a status wall.

sources.title: TinkerDen Command Inbox
sources.positive_functionality: File-backed command issue form, latest command packets, and answer proof lane.
sources.merge_question: Use as the button-success proof source for packet issue and return states.

sources.title: TinkerDen Receipts
sources.positive_functionality: Returned ACK / BLOCKER / ARTIFACT receipts with latest return and receipt history.
sources.merge_question: Use this as the receipt drawer candidate, not a fake success strip.

sources.title: TinkerDen Relay Proof
sources.positive_functionality: Stable proof-chain route for command packet, thread receipt, returned answer, and source/destination flags.
sources.merge_question: Keep as the visible proof route for the response-back-to-origin problem.

sources.title: Active Human Gates
sources.positive_functionality: Ben-only authority surface for active gate records and durable operator decisions.
sources.merge_question: Clarify this against the YubiKey expectation: YubiKey can prove identity, but this route records the operator decision.

sources.title: TinkerDen Intake / Chat to Card
sources.positive_functionality: Creates a TinkerDen packet card without hand-built markdown packet construction.
sources.merge_question: Keep the packet-card creation affordance if the final membrane needs operator packet drafting.

sources.title: TinkerDen Packet Relay Copy Block
sources.positive_functionality: Clipboard-ready Aeye packet relay blocks and autopaste event handling.
sources.merge_question: Use as the manual relay fallback when automated relay is unavailable.

sources.title: ThinkIt Origin Dash
sources.positive_functionality: Question routing queue plus latest returned answer from ThinkIt-originated relays.
sources.merge_question: Keep as the return-to-origin witness once Swanson's relay page lands.

sources.title: Static TinkerDen Packet Launcher
sources.positive_functionality: Standalone packet launcher HTML with artifact card and packet proof layout.
sources.merge_question: Keep as visual and interaction reference for a durable launcher card.

sources.title: Medulla Command Surface V0
sources.positive_functionality: Command object, receipt event object, lifecycle states, proof boundary, and forbidden crossings.
sources.merge_question: Use for exact lifecycle language and receipt states in the final relay page.

sources.title: Medulla Runtime
sources.positive_functionality: Runtime substrate candidate for event circulation outside the visual membrane.
sources.merge_question: Inspect before merging any live relay action semantics.

sources.title: Preserve TinkerDen Packet Engine / Wonka Den
sources.positive_functionality: Largest local branch source: Wonka Den metadata, DecisionSurface, workbench-first panel, Aeye loop, receipt drawer, relay cards, and command surface pieces.
sources.merge_question: Primary merge candidate for Swanson's functional relay page and packet/receipt plumbing.

sources.title: Wonka Den Safe Preview
sources.positive_functionality: Safe executor preview branch with Wonka Den route, relay cards, command surface, and receipt UI material.
sources.merge_question: Compare against preserve branch for less-broken button success semantics.

sources.title: Sally Good Salvage Snapshot
sources.positive_functionality: Older SoleDash OS, mobile field command, options deck, automatics relay grid, and command/receipt routes.
sources.merge_question: Mine for the earlier positive functionality that felt live before the current breakage.

sources.title: Sally Good Snapshot
sources.positive_functionality: Same Sally-good functional family captured as a named snapshot branch.
sources.merge_question: Use as a duplicate cross-check against salvage/betsy before deciding what dies.

sources.title: Origin Preserve Packet Engine Mirror
sources.positive_functionality: Remote mirror of the preserve packet engine branch with the same large Wonka/SoleDash source set.
sources.merge_question: Keep as remote parity check for the primary preserve branch.

sources.title: Origin Wonka Safe Preview
sources.positive_functionality: Remote Wonka safe preview with route and safe executor lineage.
sources.merge_question: Compare commit divergence before trusting local preview branch behavior.

sources.title: Origin Sally Good Salvage Mirror
sources.positive_functionality: Remote mirror of the Sally-good salvage branch.
sources.merge_question: Use as remote parity check before merging local salvage material.

sources.title: Origin Sally Good Snapshot
sources.positive_functionality: Remote snapshot of the older SoleDash Automatica relay-card surface.
sources.merge_question: Check differences against the local 87-file snapshot before deciding what dies.

sources.title: Detached Worktree / Salvage Betsy Sally Good
sources.positive_functionality: Detached runnable-looking snapshot with built .next app artifacts, SoleDash page, state routes, packet routes, receipt routes, and mobile field command.
sources.merge_question: Use this as the strongest candidate for recovering working older behavior.

sources.title: Detached Worktree / Snapshot Sally Good
sources.positive_functionality: Detached snapshot with built .next app artifacts and similar SoleDash command/relay material.
sources.merge_question: Use as a second runnable-looking baseline for what worked before it broke.

sources.title: Detached Worktree / Wonka Mood Reference
sources.positive_functionality: Visual direction source: Wonka Den mood, physical desk/lamp workshop ideas, inspect-sheet pacing, and non-dashboard genre notes.
sources.merge_question: Reference for visual feel only; do not let it replace functional relay proof.

sources.title: Origin Wonka Mood Reference
sources.positive_functionality: Remote branch containing the Wonka mood reference and draft preview shell.
sources.merge_question: Keep as remote visual provenance for the detached mood worktree.

sources.title: Salvage Bundle 20260627204538
sources.positive_functionality: Patch bundle for preserve branch containing TinkerDen return cards, receipt pickup, relay choice, Wonka Den metadata, and workbench-first CSS.
sources.merge_question: Read as an actionable recovery patch bundle, not merely archive clutter.

sources.title: Salvage Bundle 20260627204400
sources.positive_functionality: Earlier preserve branch salvage capture with nearly the same Wonka/TinkerDen recovery material.
sources.merge_question: Use for diff comparison against the newer salvage bundle before final keep/die calls.
